response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI/GenAI experience is less explicitly detailed than required, his technical leadership, cloud-adjacent work, and open-source contributions suggest adaptability. A deeper dive into his AI-specific projects and RAG/vector DB expertise is warranted.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentorship across diverse engineering roles, including Staff-level positions.
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, aligning with agentic workflows.
Strong full-stack development skills (TypeScript, Node.js, cloud tools) and open-source contributions in data-driven platforms.
concerns: Limited explicit detail about production-grade AI/GenAI solutions (e.g., RAG, vector DBs, LLM optimization).
No mention of advanced degrees (Master's/PhD) or formal AI/ML training, though practical experience may compensate.
Some roles focus on web/mobile development rather than AI/cloud infrastructure, raising questions about depth in required domains.
